hero.title: Oxide
hero.subtitle: The next-gen workspace. High-performance developer environment built with Tauri and Rust.

footer.tagline: Next-gen developer workspace. High performance, pure glass.

bento.native_desc: Broadcast commands to multiple terminals simultaneously via Rust backend.
bento.glass_desc: Integrated visual gauge and hardware-accelerated rendering.
bento.minimal_desc: A refined, distraction-free interface that stays out of your way.
bento.future_desc: Instant file discovery powered by LSM Sled storage and SQLite.
bento.undo_desc: Safe file operations with a robust undo/redo system.
bento.zoom_desc: Infinite canvas-style zoom to focus or overview your workspace.
bento.shortcuts_desc: Comprehensive keyboard mapping for ultra-fast navigation.
bento.watcher_desc: Real-time filesystem sync with advanced debounce and filtering.
